_about: Townee Directory — the bank of townsfolk who commission and post work for The Morning Queue. Townees pay DUES to keep posting rights; a townee whose dues are `owing` cannot post a new quest or commission (the `dues` failure axis). The teller looks a townee up here (a new Reference tab) to verify dues before accepting a posted quest (quest_file) or a dungeon-drop commission (dungeon_drop). Keyed by id so a check's `entry` resolves like rank_ledger. Phase 2 (Banks, 2026-07-13): blurbs authored; every id + cross-reference confirmed against ../CONTENT-BANKS.md §7. See ../CONTENT-BANKS.md §Townee Directory + §Dues.
_tab: Townee Directory — townsfolk who post; dues must be current to post

townee-hessa-brightwater.name: Hessa Brightwater
townee-hessa-brightwater.blurb: Keeps the corner shop on Tallow Row and pays her guild dues the first morning of every month, exact to the copper. Her moonwort standing order has run unbroken for six seasons; the teller has never once had cause to hold her filing.

townee-orlin-pethwick.name: Orlin Pethwick
townee-orlin-pethwick.blurb: Runs the almshouse infirmary below the north wall and orders kingsfoil by the sprig for fever-cots. Prompt with dues, though he grumbles the whole way to the desk that healers ought to post for free.

townee-sarai-quillon.name: Sarai Quillon
townee-sarai-quillon.blurb: A sharp, restless alchemist whose warded quicksilver shipments keep the forge-wards stocked. Fifteen gold behind on dues since the spring assay went sour — her standing order still fills, but the desk must turn away any NEW warded post until she squares the ledger.

townee-maud-cinderhand.name: Maud Cinderhand
townee-maud-cinderhand.blurb: Master of the river forge, broad as her own anvil, and never a day late on dues in eleven years. Her star-iron order is measured to the dram; she inspects the scale-reading herself before she'll take delivery.

townee-linnet-orrery.name: Linnet Orrery
townee-linnet-orrery.blurb: Supplies the hill-temple with sunwort by the sprig for the solstice rites — a total order, filled once and closed. Soft-spoken, meticulous, and current on dues to the last farthing.

townee-garrick-tallow.name: Garrick Tallow
townee-garrick-tallow.blurb: The tannery reeks halfway down the lane and so does his standing with the guild — eight gold owing since midwinter. His troll-bile order still resolves, but he'll get no fresh posting stamped until the dues are paid.

townee-brother-anselm.name: Brother Anselm
townee-brother-anselm.blurb: Sexton of the Crypt of Bells, gaunt and unhurried, who posted a cleric-warded cleansing when something began moving among the ossuary tiers. Dues paid a year in advance — the chapter house keeps his account.

townee-wenna-fisk.name: Wenna Fisk
townee-wenna-fisk.blurb: Nets the tidal flats at dawn and swears something out in the saltmarsh has been drowning her floats. Posted a water-warded haunt-clearance; dues current, though she paid the last installment in smoked eel by special arrangement.

townee-old-perrin.name: Old Perrin
townee-old-perrin.blurb: The mill hasn't turned true since the sluice-gear went into the millpond, and Perrin is twenty gold in arrears besides — the deepest dues debt on the roster. His retrieval posting stands filed but cannot be re-issued or amended until he clears the account.

townee-dorcas-veil.name: Dorcas Veil
townee-dorcas-veil.blurb: A widow of quiet means who commissioned the recovery of a blade her late husband lost to the sunken barrow. Dues paid without a word of complaint; she wants only the sword returned, hilt intact.

townee-sister-mabel.name: Sister Mabel
townee-sister-mabel.blurb: Tends the drowned-saint's well-shrine at the crossroads and posts for its upkeep and blessing. Cheerful, prompt, dues always current — the guild considers her account a model the others should study.

townee-cuthbert-lyle.name: Cuthbert Lyle
townee-cuthbert-lyle.blurb: A hedge-scholar forever between commissions, cataloguing barrow-marks and copying old survey maps. Holds no active posting at present but keeps his dues scrupulously current so the day he does file, the desk cannot turn him away.

townee-goodman-fenn.name: Goodman Fenn
townee-goodman-fenn.blurb: A tenant farmer on the flood-plain, six gold behind and no posting on file — he came to the desk meaning to commission a pest-clearance and left again when the teller flagged his lapsed dues. Clear the arrears first, then he may post.

townee-elga-thorne.name: Elga Thorne
townee-elga-thorne.blurb: Weaves at the loom-hall by the east gate and pays dues out of habit though she rarely posts. When she does, it is small work — a lost shuttle-weight, a warded dye shipment — and her account is always in good standing.

townee-piers-danglow.name: Piers Danglow
townee-piers-danglow.blurb: Keeps the vineyard on the south slope and the guild's account books balanced to the day. No posting active, but he treats his dues like a cellar tithe — paid before the pressing, never after.

townee-mother-ashby.name: Mother Ashby
townee-mother-ashby.blurb: The town's midwife, known in every household from the wall to the water. Posts only when a birthing-herb runs scarce; her dues are current and the guild would sooner forgive them than see her turned from the desk.

_owns_note: Every id in an `owns` array must resolve to a postings entry in references.json. apothecary/infirmary/warded/sunken-barrow-blade/well-shrine-drowned-saint already exist; forge/temple/tannery-standing-order + crypt-of-bells-cleanse/saltmarsh-haunt/millpond-retrieval are references.json ADDITIONS the Banks phase supplies (listed in ../CONTENT-BANKS.md §references.json additions).
_owing_note: 4 of 16 are `owing` (sarai-quillon 15g, garrick-tallow 8g, old-perrin 20g, goodman-fenn 6g) so the `dues` axis has live material: two own standing orders (item_check deliveries still resolve, but a NEW post/commission from them fails), one owns a retrieval, one is a pure commissioner who tried to post and was flagged.
